samples.xml_description:
<module id="pulse_detect">
    <description>Pulse Detection Module: Detects rising edges of data_in and generates a pulse signal data_out.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="data_in">One-bit input signal.</input>
        <output id="data_out">Output signal indicating the presence of pulses.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state id="S0">Initial state, waiting for rising edge.</state>
        <state id="S1">Rising edge detected, waiting for falling edge.</state>
        <state id="S2">Falling edge detected, pulse ends.</state>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <register id="state" width="2">State register to hold the current state of the pulse detection process.</register>
        <wire id="next_state" width="2">Next state based on current state and input conditions.</wire>
        <always sensitive="posedge clk or negedge rst_n">
            <if condition="!rst_n">
                <assign state=S0 />
                <assign data_out=0 />
            </if>
            <else>
                <assign state=next_state />
                <case state>
                    S0: begin
                        <if condition="data_in==1'b1">
                            <assign next_state=S1;
                            <assign data_out=0;
                        </if>
                        <else>
                            <assign next_state=S0;
                            <assign data_out=0;
                        </else>
                    </case>
                    S1: begin
                        <if condition="data_in==1'b0">
                            <assign next_state=S2;
                            <assign data_out=0;
                        </if>
                        <else>
                            <assign next_state=S1;
                            <assign data_out=0;
                        </else>
                    </case>
                    S2: begin
                        <if condition="data_in==1'b1">
                            <assign next_state=S1;
                            <assign data_out=1;
                        </if>
                        <else>
                            <assign next_state=S0;
                            <assign data_out=0;
                        </else>
                    </case>
                </case>
            </else>
        </always>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>Sequential logic to detect rising edges of data_in and generate a pulse signal data_out.</implementation>
</module>
